code.description: The code of the shop return question

is_required.description: Indication whether a consumer is required to answer this question related to the selected return reason

no_note.description: A note to show the user when they answer this `boolean` type question with `false`. Will be shown in the return portal.
no_note.example: This product cannot be returned after it was unsealed. Proceeding will lead to a rejected return request.

yes_note.description: A note to show the user when they answer this `boolean` type question with `true`. Will be shown in the return portal.
